name: notebook-cell-numbers
description: Persistent cell numbers in the status bar for every notebook cell — including markdown. Fully configurable format, alignment, and start index. Includes a 'Go to Cell...' command for quick navigation. Works on VS Code, VSCodium, and Code OSS. Available on VS Marketplace and Open VSX

notebookCellNumbers.enabled.description: Show cell index numbers in notebook cells.

notebookCellNumbers.startFrom.description: Starting number for cell indices (0 or 1).

notebookCellNumbers.format.description: Format string for the cell number. Use {n} as placeholder for the number.

notebookCellNumbers.alignment.description: Alignment of the cell number in the cell status bar.
